settings.heading: Backlit Graphics
settings.description: Illuminated graphics for lightboxes, retail displays, menus and branded interiors. Designed to look sharp and vibrant when lit from behind.

settings.question: What are backlit graphics?
settings.answer: Backlit graphics are printed on translucent material designed to be illuminated from behind, creating vibrant and eye-catching displays.

settings.question: What sizes can you produce?
settings.answer: We can produce custom sizes to fit your lightbox. Get in touch with your dimensions for a quote.

settings.question: How do I order backlit graphics?
settings.answer: Contact us with your lightbox dimensions and upload your artwork. We'll confirm the spec and get your order started.

settings.heading: Need backlit graphics?
settings.description: Get in touch with your lightbox dimensions and we'll provide a custom quote.
